examples: I stretched the rubber band until it almost broke.
The rubber band stretched almost to the breaking point.
First, stretch the skin over the frame of the drum.
I was right in the middle of a stretch when the phone rang.

definitions.text: The ability to lengthen when pulled.
examples: That rubber band has quite a bit of stretch.

definitions.text: A course of thought which diverts from straightforward logic, or requires extraordinary belief or exaggeration.
examples: It's a bit of a stretch to call Boris Karloff a comedian.
To say crossing the street was brave was quite a stretch.
